title: Enrichment and Extraction of Phytoplasma DNA from Field Samples for Whole-Genome Sequencing
author: Zala Kogej Zwitter
materials: Precipitate DNA for 20 min at room temperature.
Pipet out the ethanol and dry the pellet.
Combine parallel extractions in one tube.
Use the REPLIg-midi Kit (Qiagen, Hilden, Germany) with an input of 10 ng of enriched DNA and follow Protocol for Amplification of Purified Genomic DNA using the REPLI-g Midi Kit.

steps.title: Prepare PGB (phytoplasma grinding buffer) pH 7
steps.instruction: Prepare PGB (phytoplasma grinding buffer) pH 7.6 Chemical Final concentration 1 K2HPO4 0.096 M 2 KH2PO4 0.03 M 3 saharose 10 % 4 BSA 0.15 % 5 PVP10 2 % 6 ascorbic acid* 0.03 M BSA - bovine serum albuminPVP10 - polyvinylpyrrolidone-10 *Add ascorbic acid just before adding PGB to sample! The initial buffer without ascorbic acid can be stored up to one month at 4°C.

steps.title: Prepare CTAB buffer pH 8 Chemical...
steps.instruction: Prepare CTAB buffer pH 8 Chemical Final concentration 1 CTAB 4 % 2 PVP40 1 % 3 Tris-HCl 0.2 M 4 NaCl 1.4 M 5 EDTA 0.02 M Store the buffer at room temperature.

steps.title: Incubate at 65°C for 1 hour (vortex in between)
steps.instruction: Incubate at 65°C for 1 hour (vortex in between).

steps.title: Cut out leaf veins from fresh...
steps.instruction: Cut out leaf veins from fresh leaves taken from different parts of the plant.

steps.title: Chop leaf veins into small pieces with sterile scalpel
steps.instruction: Chop leaf veins into small pieces with sterile scalpel.

steps.title: Homogenize chopped leaf veins with liquid...
steps.instruction: Homogenize chopped leaf veins with liquid nitrogen with mortar and pestle.

steps.title: Use a pre-cooled spatula and transfer...
steps.instruction: Use a pre-cooled spatula and transfer 1 g of the powdered plant tissue sample into a pre-cooled 15 mL tubes. Warning! Keep the material frozen at all times! Option: store homogenized material at -80°C until further analysis.

steps.title: Add 2 ml of 4% CTAB...
steps.instruction: Add 2 ml of 4% CTAB buffer (warmed up to 65°C) to the pellet after differential centrifugation and resuspend by vortex.

steps.title: To 1 g of frozen homogenized...
steps.instruction: To 1 g of frozen homogenized sample add 10 mL of PGB and put on ice.

steps.title: Vortex (watch out that the centrifuge...
steps.instruction: Vortex (watch out that the centrifuge does not get warm) and short spin. rpm, °C,

steps.title: Pour the extract into pre-cooled 15...
steps.instruction: Pour the extract into pre-cooled 15 mL tubes and add PGB buffer for balancing with other samples for centrifugation.

steps.title: rpm, °C, Centrifuge 5 min at 2500 g and 4°C
steps.instruction: rpm, °C, Centrifuge 5 min at 2500 g and 4°C.

steps.title: Pour the supernatant to fresh pre-cooled...
steps.instruction: Pour the supernatant to fresh pre-cooled 15 mL tubes ( Warning! These tubes need to withstand high speed centrifugation). Balance them carefully using scale and PGB.

steps.title: rpm, °C, Centrifuge 25 min at 18,000 g and 4°C
steps.instruction: rpm, °C, Centrifuge 25 min at 18,000 g and 4°C.

steps.title: Carefully pour out the supernatant and...
steps.instruction: Carefully pour out the supernatant and drain the tube on paper towel. Keep the pellet.

steps.title: Store aliquot of isopropanol and 70%...
steps.instruction: Store aliquot of isopropanol and 70% ethanol to -20°C and warm up CTAB buffer to 65°C.

steps.title: rpm, °C, Centrifugate
steps.instruction: rpm, °C, Centrifugate: 5 min, 5000 g, room temperature.

steps.title: Divide one sample into 2 parallels for easier manipulation
steps.instruction: Divide one sample into 2 parallels for easier manipulation: transfer two times 1 ml of the sample to a 2 ml tube and add the same amount of chloroform:isoamyl alcohol (24:1) to each tube and vortex.

steps.title: rpm, °C, Centrifugate
steps.instruction: rpm, °C, Centrifugate: 10 min, 6000 g, room temperature.

steps.title: Transfer the upper aqueous phases to a fresh 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the upper aqueous phases to a fresh 1.5-tubes and add an equal amount of ice-cold isopropanol to each tube and mix by inverting.

steps.title: Wash the pellets with 300 μl ice-cold 70% ethanol
steps.instruction: Wash the pellets with 300 μl ice-cold 70% ethanol.

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 50 µl of nuclease free water
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 50 µl of nuclease free water.

steps.title: Follow manufacturers protocol for the NEBNext‱...
steps.instruction: Follow manufacturers protocol for the NEBNext‱ Microbiome DNA Enrichment Kit (New England Biolabs,Massachusetts, USA) using 80 µl of the extracted DNA.
